currentNews.title: "?M Fra*" out now on Lateral Addition
currentNews.content: New track "?M Fra*" in collaboration with RM Francis out now on Lateral Addition.

oldNews.content: New track "Requiem for a Twisted Hard Disk" out now on "Get This: 32 Tracks For Free - A Tribute to Peter Rehberg".
New album "Live from the Living Room (Straight to Hard Disk)" available now on Superpang.
New album "Berserk" available now on Superpang.
New track "Sowing and Reaping" on Superpang compilation, "Tour Mode"
"Five Sketches For JMY" out now on "Building A Better Reality" compilation
New track "Surround Reapir" out now on "Pulsar.scramble" ($ pwgen 20)! Incremental compilation featuring computer music composed with pulsar synthesis.
@ The Windjammer Brooklyn, NY: John Macedo + IMF, Luminous "Diamond Ben" Kudler, Lutkie, and Marcin Pietruszewski.
@ The Red Room Baltimore, MD: Diffusion Festival w/ Marcin Pietruszewski, Jessica Ekomane, and IMF.
"Solo For Computer and Amplified Metal" included on Function() Festival compilation.
@ Vox Populi Gallery Philadelphia, PA: IMF, Ruben Patino, LXV, Reed Evan Rosenberg.
Ten short pulsar studies included on Hyperchaos Vol 1 released by Edvacm.
Keroaän "Pulsars In Rhombus Form" out now on Nada.
